content:
.into_iter()
            .map(|(r, _score)| r)
            .filter(|r| visibility_filter(r, &opts.visibility, opts.agent_id.as_deref()))
            .take(opts.limit)
            .collect();

        let post_filter_count = filtered.len();

        info!(
            vector_count,
            graph_expanded,
            post_filter_count,
            latency_ms = start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,
            "rag_retrieved"
        );

        Ok(RetrievalResult {
            results: filtered,
            metrics: RetrievalMetrics {
                latency_ms: start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,
                vector_results: vector_count,
                graph_expanded,
                post_filter_count,
                retriever_name: self.name().into(),
            },
        })
    }
}
```

**Step 4: Run tests to verify they pass**

Run: `cargo test -p corvia-kernel -- retriever::tests --nocapture`
Expected: all 5 tests PASS

**Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add crates/corvia-kernel/src/retriever.rs
git commit -m "feat(m3.2): GraphExpandRetriever — vector + graph edge expansion with α blending"
```
